title: ホープフルSの後に・エデンへの道

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having conquered the Hopeful Stakes, Gold Ship
finds herself adrift without a goal. Is there
nowhere left for her competitive spirit to go?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She decides to pursue the art of putting
decorative leaves into sushi boxes. Is that really
what you want, Gold Ship?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, the Book of Secrets appears before Gold
Ship, enlightening her of the path to Eden. The
knowledge motivates her to gear up for the
Classics in earnest.
